# Tips180

> Tips180 is one of the most accurate football prediction sites, providing free and premium football tips, correct scores and accumulators across every market, with a focus on Nigerian and African football.

## Key pages

- [Football Predictions Today](https://www.tips180.com/): Today's free football predictions and betting tips.
- [Our Plans](https://www.tips180.com/our-plans): Premium subscription tiers and pricing.
- [Leagues](https://www.tips180.com/leagues): Predictions by league and competition.
- [About Us](https://www.tips180.com/about-us): Who we are and how we make predictions.

## Notes

- Primary audience: Nigeria and Africa (en-NG).
- Accuracy archive and named tipster profiles are planned high-trust assets (see SEO/GEO master plan).
